Since the arrays are sorted, the smallest pair is always (nums1[0], nums2[0]).
Think about which pairs could be the next smallest. If we pick (nums1[i], nums2[j]), the next candidates could be (nums1[i+1], nums2[j]) or (nums1[i], nums2[j+1]).
Use a min-heap to efficiently find the pair with the minimum sum among current candidates.
